name: drivers-index
description: External MicroPython driver library index — sourced from awesome-micropython.com. Each category has its own JSON listing top community drivers with GitHub URLs, install methods, and community ratings (stars). AI can git-clone cached copies, analyze, and add usage notes.

workflow.lookup: Search this index for the sensor/chip → find driver repo URL
workflow.cache: git clone <repo> into drivers/cache/<name>/ → available offline
workflow.analyze: Read driver code → write analysis_notes in the category JSON (API, quirks, memory)
workflow.use: After using in a project → write usage_notes (what worked, what didn't, gotchas)
workflow.vote: Increment upvotes/downvotes in the driver entry based on real experience

sensor.description: Temperature, humidity, pressure, gas, light, IMU, distance, current — all sensors

actuator.description: Motors, servos, relays, steppers — see also hardware/

storage.description: SD cards, EEPROM, FRAM, Flash, databases

communication.description: GPS, RFID, NFC, CAN, RS485, radio

audio.description: I2S DAC/ADC, MP3 decoders, speech synthesis
